data.body: Resolved by sibling story 6bf8-858d (commit 0ee92c5a). The real-URL e2e path now exists at tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app-real-url.sh — opt-in via RUN_REAL_URL_E2E=1, runs daily in .github/workflows/template-real-url-e2e.yml. The original PATH-stubbing test (test-create-dso-app.sh) remains as the fast network-independent layer; the new test is the network-dependent layer that catches real template/installer drift.
